gold.title: Sign Up
gold.reason: Split-screen layout with a dark gradient left panel (gray-900 to orange-900) and right-side form — a premium visual pattern that immediately elevates a landing page sign-up experience.

gold.title: Popover Form
gold.reason: Animated popover with Framer Motion layout transitions and a shared layout ID — modern micro-interaction UX that makes feedback or contact forms feel polished and alive.

gold.title: Form
gold.reason: Domain-specific booking form with motion animations, icon-enhanced inputs (MapPin, CalendarDays, BedDouble), and a composable API — visually rich and directly usable for hospitality or travel SaaS websites.

gold.title: Success Login Card
gold.reason: Animated success state with checkmark/color-shift transitions after login — a rare component that handles the post-submit moment with premium motion design, making auth flows feel complete.

gold.title: Feedback Widget
gold.reason: Emoji-driven sentiment feedback widget with Radix ToggleGroup and markdown rendering — highly polished UX pattern with animated emoji states and real-world SaaS applicability.

gold.title: Ride Booking Form
gold.reason: Full-featured booking form with Framer Motion, background image support, and structured pickup/dropoff/date/time fields — visually impressive and directly deployable for marketplace or booking websites.

gold.title: Morphing Input
gold.reason: Input that morphs between states with smooth Motion animations and HugeIcons — a distinctive animated primitive that makes forms feel premium and interactive.

gold.title: Form Layout
gold.reason: Structured multi-section form layout with a feature highlights panel, plan selector, and shadcn Card/Badge/Select components — a solid split-panel SaaS upgrade flow component.

silver.title: Unsave Popup
silver.reason: Discord-inspired animated save-confirmation popup with shake animation on discard — clever micro-interaction useful for dashboard editors, but too niche for a full page redesign.

silver.title: Morphing Popover
silver.reason: Smooth popover with shared layout animations via MotionConfig and AnimatePresence — well-built primitive but requires composition to become a useful form UI.

silver.title: Multi Step Form
silver.reason: Animated multi-step form using Framer Motion and CVA variants — functional and visually decent but the multi-step pattern adds complexity without distinctive visual flair.

silver.title: Contact 2
silver.reason: Clean two-column contact section with contact details on the left and form on the right using shadcn inputs — good layout structure, but relies purely on utility classes with no animations.

silver.title: Form 1
silver.reason: Indigo-accented contact form with a centered layout and clear label hierarchy — clean and presentable but minimal styling with no animation or special visual treatment.

silver.title: Create Workspace Modal
silver.reason: Workspace creation modal with a custom Modal component system — good structure for SaaS app onboarding but niche and scoped to post-login flows.

silver.title: Confetti
silver.reason: Confetti animation component with a rich API (createPortal, forwardRef, global options) — fun celebration effect useful for form submission success states but not a form itself.

silver.title: Cloud Watch Form
silver.reason: Animated eye/cursor-tracking login form with unique interactive eyes that follow mouse movement — creative concept and attention-grabbing but too gimmicky for most business websites.

silver.title: Progress Indicator
silver.reason: Framer Motion animated step progress indicator with CircleCheck icons — polished utility component for multi-step flows but only a progress UI, not a full form.

silver.title: Framer Motion Switch
silver.reason: Smooth liquid-animation toggle switch using Framer Motion — well-crafted primitive with great micro-interaction but too atomic for standalone use in a website redesign.

bronze.title: Auth Switch
bronze.reason: Placeholder counter component (increment/decrement) incorrectly filed as an auth-switch — no real auth or form UI present.

bronze.title: Multistep Form
bronze.reason: File only contains a bare cn() utility function with no actual form component — incomplete or broken component.

bronze.title: Input 1
bronze.reason: Single unstyled Base UI input primitive — a bare HTML input wrapper with minimal class styling, not a usable form component.

bronze.title: Form [react-aria-components]
bronze.reason: React Aria field primitives with CVA variants — accessibility-focused infrastructure component, not a visual form design piece.

bronze.title: Forgot Password
bronze.reason: Basic forgot password page with shadcn Input/Label/Button and a Next.js Link — bare-bones utility flow with no visual distinction.

bronze.title: Sign Up
bronze.reason: Contains only a counter increment/decrement placeholder — no sign-up form present, clearly broken or placeholder content.

bronze.title: Otp Verify
bronze.reason: 4-digit OTP input with basic ref management — niche verification flow with plain HTML inputs and no visual styling.

bronze.title: Form
bronze.reason: Shadcn form wrapper re-export using Radix Slot and react-hook-form — pure utility infrastructure, identical to shadcn's own form primitive.

bronze.title: Input
bronze.reason: CVA input with size variants — a useful primitive but too atomic and unstyled to add visual value in a website redesign.

bronze.title: Form
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn/ui form primitive using react-hook-form Controller and Radix Label — this is the raw shadcn form infrastructure, not a designed component.
